creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Tue, Jan 23, 2007 at 10:46:46AM +0000, Terry Vernon wrote:
> 

So where are the examples of the tail?? Without those the
report is rather useless since we are unable to see what
might be going on. Can you include this in the ticket please
(just reply-all to this email and it will be done).

Thanks for the willingness to improve FreeBSD
